CC=clang CXX=clang++ CFLAGS="-O2 -std=gnu99" CXXFLAGS="-O2 -std=gnu++11" ../binutils-2.42/configure --prefix=/data/data/com.termux/files/usr/local --target=aarch64-linux-android --bindir=/data/data/com.termux/files/usr/local/libexec/binutils --with-gmp=/data/data/com.termux/files/usr --with-mpc=/data/data/com.termux/files/usr --with-mpfr=/data/data/com.termux/files/usr --disable-nls --enable-build-warnings --enable-threads --with-system-zlib --enable-plugins --enable-gold --enable-gprofng=no --disable-gprofng-tools --enable-new-dtags --enable-relro --enable-lto --enable-64-bit-bfd --enable-deterministic-archives --enable-initfini-array --enable-default-hash-style=both --enable-eh-frame-hdr-for-static --enable-colored-disassembly --enable-generate-build-notes --enable-x86-used-note --enable-warn-execstack --enable-warn-rwx-segments --with-sysroot=/data/data/com.termux/files --with-lib-path="/data/data/com.termux/files/usr/local/lib:/data/data/com.termux/files/usr/lib:/system/lib64:/data/data/com.termux/files/usr/aarch64-linux-android/lib"
